meaning: n.(传说中的) 人头狮身龙尾(或蝎尾) 怪兽
examples: He grapples with the manticore, keeping its mantis forelimbs from locking onto him.
The manticore is the most fearsome of Pandoran predators, and by the look, it might be the toughest carnivore in the known universe.
The manticore is said to have a body of a lion and the venomous tail of a scorpion. Has the power of poison.
Loathing his devouring dollars like the fabled manticore.
